description: Trigger discrimination for the Phase 1 operating-discipline pack, change-governance cluster: classification (route) vs approval (stop sign) vs diff discipline (edit hygiene).

cases.prompt: I'm about to add an index to speed up the orders query — what checks does this change need before I start?
cases.reason: Asking what rigor/validation a change needs is classification; the boundary only owns the actual stop.

cases.prompt: OK to run the destructive migration against prod now?
cases.reason: Explicit permission request for a risky action — the stop sign, not the router.

cases.prompt: My working diff has 30 files but the task was a one-line bug fix — help me trim it and stage just the fix.
cases.reason: In-flight diff hygiene and staging, not pre-work risk routing.

cases.prompt: Does changing the invoice PDF template need sign-off before I start, or can I just do it?
cases.reason: Determining the approval path is the gate's job; the boundary fires only when a risky step is actually imminent.
